2// Name: mathplot.cpp
3// Purpose: Framework for plotting in wxWindows
4// Original Author: David Schalig

7// Oskar Waldemarsson (for multi Y axis and corrections)

15#define MATHPLOT_H_INCLUDED

77// mathplot_EXPORTS definition uses windows dll to export function.
78// mathplot_EXPORTS will be defined by cmake
79#ifdef mathplot_EXPORTS
81 #define WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT WXEXPORT
83 #define WXDLLIMPEXP_DATA_MATHPLOT(type) WXEXPORT type
84#else // not making DLL
86 #define WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT
88 #define WXDLLIMPEXP_DATA_MATHPLOT(type) type
89#endif
90
91#if defined(__GNUG__) && !defined(__APPLE__) && !defined(__INTEL_CLANG_COMPILER)
92 #pragma interface "mathplot.h"
93#endif
94
95#include <cassert> // For assert debug message (assert is disabled if NDEBUG is defined)
96#include <vector>
97#include <map>
98#include <unordered_map>
99
107// Multiple define to compile with C++14 because
108// Optional is only for C++ >= 17
109// Structured binding is a C++17 feature
110#if (defined(__cplusplus) && (__cplusplus > 201402L)) // C++17 or newer
111 // Use optional
112 #include <optional>
114 typedef std::optional<unsigned int> mpOptional_uint;
116 typedef std::optional<int> mpOptional_int;
118 #define MP_OPTNULL_INT std::nullopt
120 #define MP_OPTTEST(opt) (opt)
122 #define MP_OPTGET(opt) (*opt)
123 // Use structured binding
125 #define MP_LOOP_ITER auto& [m_yID, m_yData]
126#else
127 // To replace optional int...
129 typedef unsigned int mpOptional_uint;
131 typedef int mpOptional_int;
133 #define MP_OPTNULL_INT -1
135 #define MP_OPTTEST(opt) ((opt) != -1)
137 #define MP_OPTGET(opt) (opt)
138 // To replace structured binding...
140 #define MP_LOOP_ITER auto& elem
142 #define m_yID elem.first
144 #define m_yData elem.second
145#endif
146

211
213#define MP_EPSILON 1e-30
215#define MP_ISNOTNULL(x) (std::fpclassify(x) != FP_ZERO)

265struct mpRect
266{
267 union {
268 struct
269 {
270 wxCoord startPx;
271 wxCoord startPy;
272 wxCoord endPx;
273 wxCoord endPy;
274 };
275 struct
276 {
277 wxCoord left;
278 wxCoord top;
279 wxCoord right;
280 wxCoord bottom;
281 };
282 struct
283 {
284 wxCoord x1;
285 wxCoord y1;
286 wxCoord x2;
287 wxCoord y2;
288 };
289 wxCoord tab[4];
290 };
295 wxRect GetRect(void)
296 {
297 return wxRect(startPx, startPy, endPx - startPx, endPy - startPy);
298 }
299};
300static_assert(sizeof(mpRect) == 4 * sizeof(wxCoord));
301
307template<typename T>
308struct mpRange
309{
310 T min = 0;
311 T max = 0;
312
314 mpRange()
315 {
316 min = 0;
317 max = 0;
318 }
319
321 mpRange(T value1, T value2)
322 {
323 if (value1 < value2)
324 {
325 min = value1;
326 max = value2;
327 }
328 else
329 {
330 min = value2;
331 max = value1;
332 }
333 }
334
336 void Set(T _value)
337 {
338 min = _value;
339 max = _value;
340 }
341
343 void Set(T _min, T _max)
344 {
345 min = _min;
346 max = _max;
347 }
348
350 void SetMin(T _min)
351 {
352 min = _min;
353 if (max < min)
354 max = min;
355 }
356
358 void SetMax(T _max)
359 {
360 max = _max;
361 if (min > max)
362 min = max;
363 }
364
366 void Assign(T value1, T value2)
367 {
368 if (value1 < value2)
369 {
370 min = value1;
371 max = value2;
372 }
373 else
374 {
375 min = value2;
376 max = value1;
377 }
378 }
379
381 bool IsSet()
382 {
383 return ((min != 0) || (max != 0));
384 }
385
390 void Update(T value)
391 {
392 if (value < min)
393 min = value;
394 else
395 if (value > max)
396 max = value;
397 }
398
402 void Update(T _min, T _max)
403 {
404 if (_min < min)
405 min = _min;
406 if (_max > max)
407 max = _max;
408 }
409
412 void Update(mpRange range)
413 {
414 if (range.min < min)
415 min = range.min;
416 if (range.max > max)
417 max = range.max;
418 }
419
421 void Check(void)
422 {
423 if (min == max)
424 {
425 if (max > 0)
426 min = 0;
427 else
428 max = 0;
429 }
430 }
431
433 T Length(void) const
434 {
435 return max - min;
436 }
437
439 T GetCenter(void) const
440 {
441 return (min + max) / 2;
442 }
443
445 T GetMaxAbs(void) const
446 {
447 return std::max(fabs(min), fabs(max));
448 }
449
451 void ToLog(void)
452 {
453 min = (min > 0) ? log10(min) : 0;
454 max = (max > 0) ? log10(max) : 0;
455 }
456
458 bool PointIsInside(T point) const
459 {
460 return ((point >= min) && (point <= max));
461 }
462
463 #if (defined(__cplusplus) && (__cplusplus > 201703L)) // C++20 or newer
464 bool operator==(const mpRange&) const = default;
465 #else
467 bool operator==(const mpRange &other) const
468 {
469 return (min == other.min) && (max == other.max);
470 }
472 bool operator!=(const mpRange& other) const
473 {
474 return !(*this == other);
475 }
476 #endif
477};
478
484struct [[deprecated("Deprecated! No longer used as X and Y are now separated")]] mpFloatRect
485{
486 mpRange<double> x;
487 std::vector<mpRange<double>> y;
488
495 mpFloatRect(mpWindow& w);
496
498 mpFloatRect() = delete;
499
506 bool PointIsInside(double px, double py, size_t yAxisID = 0) const {
507 if (yAxisID < y.size())
508 {
509 if( (px < x.min || px > x.max) ||
510 (py < y[yAxisID].min || py > y[yAxisID].max))
511 {
512 return false;
513 }
514 }
515 else
516 {
517 return false;
518 }
519
520 return true;
521 }
522
529 void UpdateBoundingBoxToInclude(double px, double py, size_t yAxisID = 0) {
530 assert(yAxisID < y.size());
531 if (yAxisID < y.size())
532 {
533 if (px < x.min ) x.min = px;
534 else if (px > x.max ) x.max = px;
535 if (py < y[yAxisID].min ) y[yAxisID].min = py;
536 else if (py > y[yAxisID].max ) y[yAxisID].max = py;
537 }
538 }
539
546 void InitializeBoundingBox(double px, double py, size_t yAxisID = 0) {
547 assert(yAxisID < y.size());
548 if (yAxisID < y.size())
549 {
550 x.min = x.max = px;
551 y[yAxisID].min = y[yAxisID].max = py;
552 }
553 }
555 bool IsNotSet(mpWindow& w) const { const mpFloatRect def(w); return *this==def; }
557#if (defined(__cplusplus) && (__cplusplus > 201703L)) // C++ > C++17 (MSVC requires <AdditionalOptions>/Zc:__cplusplus</AdditionalOptions>
558 bool operator==(const mpFloatRect&) const = default;
559#else
560 // We compare with an epsilon precision
561 // NOTE: should be unnecessary as we are looking for any changes; normally this will be an exact match or a real change...
562 bool operator==(const mpFloatRect& rect) const
563 {
564 auto Same = [](double a, double b) {
565 return std::fabs(a - b) < MP_EPSILON;
566 };
567
568 // Compare scalar members
569 if (!Same(x.min, rect.x.min) || !Same(x.max, rect.x.max))
570 {
571 return false;
572 }
573
574 // Compare vector sizes
575 if (y.size() != rect.y.size())
576 {
577 return false;
578 }
579
580 // Compare each Y boundary
581 for (size_t i = 0; i < y.size(); ++i)
582 {
583 if (!Same(y[i].min, rect.y[i].min) ||
584 !Same(y[i].max, rect.y[i].max) )
585 {
586 return false;
587 }
588 }
589
590 return true;
591 }
592#endif
593};
594
600struct mpFloatRectSimple
601{
602 mpRange<double> x;
603 mpRange<double> y;
604
610 mpFloatRectSimple(mpRange<double> _x, mpRange<double> _y) : x(_x), y(_y) { };
611
617 bool PointIsInside(double px, double py) const {
618 return x.PointIsInside(px) && y.PointIsInside(py);
619 }
620
626 void UpdateBoundingBoxToInclude(double px, double py)
627 {
628 x.Update(px);
629 y.Update(py);
630 }
631
636 void InitializeBoundingBox(double px, double py)
637 {
638 x.Set(px, px);
639 y.Set(py, py);
640 }
641};

657 mpID_CONFIG,

659 mpID_LOAD_FILE,

662};

875class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpLayer: public wxObject
876{
877 public:
882 mpLayer(mpLayerType layerType);
883
884 virtual ~mpLayer()
885 {
886 ;
887 }
888
891 void SetWindow(mpWindow &w)
892 {
893 m_win = &w;
894 }
895
903 virtual bool HasBBox()
904 {
905 return true;
906 }
907
911 mpLayerType GetLayerType() const
912 {
913 return m_type;
914 }
915
919 int GetLayerSubType() const
920 {
921 return m_subtype;
922 }
923
929 virtual bool IsLayerType(mpLayerType typeOfInterest, int *subtype)
930 {
931 *subtype = m_subtype;
932 return (m_type == typeOfInterest);
933 }
934
938 virtual double GetMinX()
939 {
940 return -1.0;
941 }
942
946 virtual double GetMaxX()
947 {
948 return 1.0;
949 }
950
954 virtual double GetMinY()
955 {
956 return -1.0;
957 }
958
962 virtual double GetMaxY()
963 {
964 return 1.0;
965 }
966
1008 void Plot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1009
1013 void SetName(const wxString &name)
1014 {
1015 m_name = name;
1016 }
1017
1021 const wxString& GetName() const
1022 {
1023 return m_name;
1024 }
1025
1029 void SetFont(const wxFont &font)
1030 {
1031 m_font = font;
1032 }
1033
1037 const wxFont& GetFont() const
1038 {
1039 return m_font;
1040 }
1041
1045 void SetFontColour(const wxColour &colour)
1046 {
1047 m_fontcolour = colour;
1048 }
1049
1053 const wxColour& GetFontColour() const
1054 {
1055 return m_fontcolour;
1056 }
1057
1061 void SetPen(const wxPen &pen)
1062 {
1063 m_pen = pen;
1064 }
1065
1069 const wxPen& GetPen() const
1070 {
1071 return m_pen;
1072 }
1073
1076 void SetBrush(const wxBrush &brush)
1077 {
1078 if (brush == wxNullBrush)
1079 m_brush = *wxTRANSPARENT_BRUSH;
1080 else
1081 m_brush = brush;
1082 }
1083
1087 void SetBrush(const wxColour &colour, enum wxBrushStyle style = wxBRUSHSTYLE_SOLID)
1088 {
1089 m_brush.SetColour(colour);
1090 m_brush.SetStyle(style);
1091 }
1092
1095 const wxBrush& GetBrush() const
1096 {
1097 return m_brush;
1098 }
1099
1102 void SetShowName(bool show)
1103 {
1104 m_showName = show;
1105 }
1106
1109 inline bool GetShowName() const
1110 {
1111 return m_showName;
1112 }
1113
1116 void SetDrawOutsideMargins(bool drawModeOutside)
1117 {
1118 m_drawOutsideMargins = drawModeOutside;
1119 }
1120
1123 bool GetDrawOutsideMargins() const
1124 {
1125 return m_drawOutsideMargins;
1126 }
1127
1132 wxBitmap GetColourSquare(int side = 16);
1133
1136 inline bool IsVisible() const
1137 {
1138 return m_visible;
1139 }
1140
1143 virtual void SetVisible(bool show)
1144 {
1145 m_visible = show;
1146 }
1147
1150 inline bool IsTractable() const
1151 {
1152 return m_tractable;
1153 }
1154
1157 virtual void SetTractable(bool track)
1158 {
1159 m_tractable = track;
1160 }
1161
1164 void SetAlign(int align)
1165 {
1166 m_flags = align;
1167 }
1168
1171 int GetAlign() const
1172 {
1173 return m_flags;
1174 }
1175
1178 void SetCanDelete(bool canDelete)
1179 {
1180 m_CanDelete = canDelete;
1181 }
1182
1185 bool GetCanDelete(void) const
1186 {
1187 return m_CanDelete;
1188 }
1189
1192 mpLayerZOrder GetZIndex(void) const
1193 {
1194 return m_ZIndex;
1195 }
1196
1197 protected:
1198 const mpLayerType m_type;
1199 mpWindow* m_win;
1200 int m_subtype;
1201 wxFont m_font;
1202 wxColour m_fontcolour;
1203 wxPen m_pen;
1204 wxBrush m_brush;
1205 wxString m_name;
1206 bool m_showName;
1207 bool m_drawOutsideMargins;
1208 bool m_visible;
1209 bool m_tractable;
1210 int m_flags;
1211 mpRect m_plotBoundaries;
1212 bool m_CanDelete;
1213 mpLayerZOrder m_ZIndex;
1214
1217 void UpdateContext(wxDC &dc) const;
1218
1223 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w) = 0;
1224
1229 virtual bool DoBeforePlot()
1230 {
1231 return true;
1232 }
1233
1240 void CheckLog(double *x, double *y, int yAxisID);
1241
1242 private:
1243 bool m_busy;
1244 mpLayer() = delete; // default ctor not implemented/permitted
1245
1246 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpLayer);
1247};
1248
1249//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1250// mpInfoLayer

1258class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpInfoLayer: public mpLayer
1259{
1260 public:
1262 mpInfoLayer();
1263
1268 mpInfoLayer(wxPoint pos, const wxBrush &brush = *wxTRANSPARENT_BRUSH, mpLocation location = mpMarginUser);
1269
1271 virtual ~mpInfoLayer();
1272
1275 virtual void SetVisible(bool show);
1276
1281 virtual void UpdateInfo(mpWindow &w, wxEvent &event);
1282
1285 virtual bool HasBBox()
1286 {
1287 return false;
1288 }
1289
1292 [[deprecated("Use Show() instead")]]
1293 virtual void ErasePlot(wxDC&, mpWindow&) {};
1294
1298 virtual bool Inside(const wxPoint &point);
1299
1303 virtual void Move(wxPoint delta, mpWindow &w);
1304
1306 virtual void UpdateReference();
1307
1310 wxPoint GetPosition() const
1311 {
1312 return m_dim.GetPosition();
1313 }
1314
1317 void SetInitialPosition(wxPoint pos)
1318 {
1319 m_relX = pos.x / 100.0;
1320 m_relY = pos.y / 100.0;
1321 }
1322
1325 wxSize GetSize() const
1326 {
1327 return m_dim.GetSize();
1328 }
1329
1332 const wxRect& GetRectangle() const
1333 {
1334 return m_dim;
1335 }
1336
1339 void SetLocation(mpLocation location)
1340 {
1341 m_location = location;
1342 }
1343
1346 mpLocation GetLocation() const
1347 {
1348 return m_location;
1349 }
1350
1351 protected:
1352 wxRect m_dim;
1353 wxBitmap* m_info_bmp;
1354 wxPoint m_reference;
1355 double m_relX;
1356 double m_relY;
1357 mpLocation m_location;
1358
1363 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1364
1367 void SetInfoRectangle(mpWindow &w, int width = 0, int height = 0);
1368
1369 private:
1370 double clamp(double v, double min, double max);
1371
1372 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpInfoLayer);
1373};

1379class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpInfoCoords: public mpInfoLayer
1380{
1381 public:

1384
1386 mpInfoCoords(mpLocation location);
1387
1392 mpInfoCoords(wxPoint pos, const wxBrush &brush = *wxTRANSPARENT_BRUSH, mpLocation location = mpMarginUser);
1393
1395 ~mpInfoCoords()
1396 {
1397 ;
1398 }
1399
1403 virtual void UpdateInfo(mpWindow &w, wxEvent &event);
1404
1407 [[deprecated("Use Show() instead")]]
1408 virtual void ErasePlot(wxDC&, mpWindow&) {};
1409
1412 void Show(bool show)
1413 {
1414 m_show = show;
1415 }
1416
1419 bool IsShown()
1420 {
1421 return m_show;
1422 }
1423
1428 bool ShouldBeShown(wxRect plotArea, wxPoint mousePos)
1429 {
1430 return IsVisible() && (GetDrawOutsideMargins() || plotArea.Contains(mousePos));
1431 }
1432
1436 void SetLabelMode(mpLabelType mode, unsigned int time_conv = MP_X_RAWTIME)
1437 {
1438 m_labelType = mode;
1439 m_timeConv = time_conv;
1440 }
1441
1444 void SetSeriesCoord(bool show)
1445 {
1446 m_series_coord = show;
1447 }
1448
1451 bool IsSeriesCoord() const
1452 {
1453 return m_series_coord;
1454 }
1455
1461 virtual wxString GetInfoCoordsText(mpWindow &w, double xVal, std::unordered_map<int, double> yValList);
1462
1465 void SetPenSeries(const wxPen &pen)
1466 {
1467 m_penSeries = pen;
1468 }
1469
1473 void DrawContent(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1474
1475 protected:
1476 bool m_show;
1477 wxString m_content;
1478 mpLabelType m_labelType;
1479 unsigned int m_timeConv;
1480 wxCoord m_mouseX;
1481 wxCoord m_mouseY;
1482 bool m_series_coord;
1483 wxPen m_penSeries;
1484
1489 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1490
1491 private:
1492 std::unordered_map<int, double> m_yValList;
1493
1494 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpInfoCoords);
1495};

1501class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpInfoLegend: public mpInfoLayer
1502{
1503 public:
1505 mpInfoLegend();
1506
1512 mpInfoLegend(wxPoint pos, const wxBrush &brush = *wxWHITE_BRUSH, mpLocation location = mpMarginUser);
1513
1515 ~mpInfoLegend() {}
1516
1519 void SetItemMode(mpLegendStyle mode)
1520 {
1521 m_item_mode = mode;
1522 m_needs_update = true;
1523 }
1524
1526 mpLegendStyle GetItemMode() const
1527 {
1528 return m_item_mode;
1529 }
1530
1533 void SetItemDirection(mpLegendDirection mode)
1534 {
1535 m_item_direction = mode;
1536 m_needs_update = true;
1537 }
1538
1540 mpLegendDirection GetItemDirection() const
1541 {
1542 return m_item_direction;
1543 }
1544
1546 void SetNeedUpdate()
1547 {
1548 m_needs_update = true;
1549 }
1550
1553 void ShowDraggedSeries(bool active)
1554 {
1555 m_showDraggedSeries = active;
1556 }
1557
1560 bool IsDraggedSeriesShown() const
1561 {
1562 return m_showDraggedSeries;
1563 }
1564
1570 int GetLegendHitRegion(wxPoint mousePos);
1571
1578 void DrawDraggedSeries(wxDC& dc, mpWindow &w);
1579
1583 void DrawContent(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1584
1587 void RestoreAxisHighlighting(mpWindow &w);
1588
1590 enum HitCode : int
1591 {
1592 HitNone = -1,
1593 HitHeader = -2
1594 };
1595
1596 mpFunction* m_selectedSeries = nullptr;
1597 mpOptional_int m_lastHoveredAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT;
1598
1599 protected:
1600 mpLegendStyle m_item_mode;
1601 mpLegendDirection m_item_direction;
1602 bool m_showDraggedSeries;
1603 wxString m_headerString = wxString::FromUTF8("≡");
1604
1609 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1610
1611 private:
1613 struct LegendDetail
1614 {
1615 unsigned int layerIdx;
1616 wxCoord legendEnd;
1618 };
1619 std::vector<LegendDetail> m_LegendDetailList;
1620 wxCoord m_headerEnd;
1621 bool m_needs_update;
1632 void UpdateBitmap(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1633
1634 private:
1635 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpInfoLegend);
1636};

1638//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1639// mpLayer implementations - functions
1640//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1641
1642
1649class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpFunction: public mpLayer
1650{
1651 public:
1657 mpFunction(mpLayerType layerType = mpLAYER_PLOT, const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, unsigned int yAxisID = 0);
1658
1662 void SetContinuity(bool continuity)
1663 {
1664 m_continuous = continuity;
1665 }
1666
1670 bool GetContinuity() const
1671 {
1672 return m_continuous;
1673 }
1674
1677 void SetStep(unsigned int step)
1678 {
1679 m_step = step;
1680 }
1681
1684 unsigned int GetStep() const
1685 {
1686 return m_step;
1687 }
1688
1691 void SetSymbol(mpSymbol symbol)
1692 {
1693 m_symbol = symbol;
1694 }
1695
1698 mpSymbol GetSymbol() const
1699 {
1700 return m_symbol;
1701 }
1702
1705 void SetSymbolSize(int size)
1706 {
1707 m_symbolSize = size;
1708 }
1709
1712 int GetSymbolSize() const
1713 {
1714 return m_symbolSize;
1715 }
1716
1720 virtual bool DrawSymbol(wxDC &dc, wxCoord x, wxCoord y);
1721
1725 int GetYAxisID() const
1726 {
1727 return m_yAxisID;
1728 }
1729
1734 void SetYAxisID(unsigned int yAxisID)
1735 {
1736 m_yAxisID = yAxisID;
1737 }
1738
1742 void SetLegendIsAlwaysVisible(bool alwaysVisible)
1743 {
1744 m_LegendIsAlwaysVisible = alwaysVisible;
1745 }
1746
1750 bool GetLegendIsAlwaysVisible() const
1751 {
1752 return m_LegendIsAlwaysVisible;
1753 }
1754
1758 void SetAutoStep(bool enable)
1759 {
1760 m_autoStep = enable;
1761 }
1762
1765 bool GetAutoStep() const
1766 {
1767 return m_autoStep;
1768 }
1769
1773 void SetMaxNOfPoints(size_t nOfPoints)
1774 {
1775 m_maxNOfPoints = nOfPoints;
1776 }
1777
1780 size_t GetMaxNOfPoints() const
1781 {
1782 return m_maxNOfPoints;
1783 }
1784
1785 protected:
1786 bool m_continuous;
1787 mpSymbol m_symbol;
1788 int m_symbolSize;
1789 unsigned int m_step;
1790 int m_yAxisID;
1791 bool m_LegendIsAlwaysVisible;
1792 bool m_autoStep;
1793 size_t m_maxNOfPoints;
1794
1795 private:
1796 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpFunction);
1797};

1801class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpLine: public mpFunction
1802{

1814 {
1815 return false;
1816 }

1822 {
1823 return m_value;
1824 }
1825

1830 {
1831 m_value = value;
1832 }
1833
1837 bool IsHorizontal(void) const
1838 {
1839 return m_IsHorizontal;
1840 }
1841
1842 protected:

1844 bool m_IsHorizontal;
1845
1846 private:
1847 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpLine);
1848};

2049class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpFXY: public mpFunction
2050{
2051 public:
2057 mpFXY(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, int flags = mpALIGN_SW, bool viewAsBar = false, unsigned int yAxisID = 0);
2058
2062 virtual void Rewind() = 0;
2063
2067 virtual void Clear()
2068 {
2069 ;
2070 }
2071
2075 virtual int GetSize()
2076 {
2077 return 0;
2078 }
2079
2086 virtual bool GetNextXY(double *x, double *y) = 0;
2087
2094 bool DoGetNextXY(double *x, double *y);
2095
2100 void SetViewMode(bool asBar);
2101
2106 int GetBarWidth(void) const
2107 {
2108 return m_BarWidth;
2109 }
2110
2115 bool ViewAsBar(void) const
2116 {
2117 return m_ViewAsBar;
2118 }
2119
2120 protected:
2121
2122 // Data to calculate label positioning
2123 mpRange<int> m_drawX;
2124 mpRange<int> m_drawY;
2125
2126 // Min delta between 2 x coordinate (used for view as bar)
2127 double m_deltaX;
2128 double m_deltaY;
2129
2130 int m_BarWidth;
2131
2132 bool m_ViewAsBar = false;
2133
2140 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
2141
2146 void UpdateViewBoundary(wxCoord xnew, wxCoord ynew);
2147
2148 private:
2149 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpFXY);
2150};
2151
2152//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2153// mpFXYVector - provided by Jose Luis Blanco
2154//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2155
2175class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpFXYVector: public mpFXY
2176{
2177 public:
2183 mpFXYVector(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, int flags = mpALIGN_SW, bool viewAsBar = false, unsigned int yAxisID = 0);
2184
2187 virtual ~mpFXYVector()
2188 {
2189 Clear();
2190 }
2191
2196 void SetData(const std::vector<double> &xs, const std::vector<double> &ys);
2197
2201 void Clear() override;
2202
2207 virtual int GetSize() override
2208 {
2209 return m_xs.size();
2210 }
2211
2219 bool AddData(const double x, const double y, bool updatePlot);
2220
2227 void SetReserve(int reserve)
2228 {
2229 m_reserveXY = reserve;
2230 m_xs.reserve(m_reserveXY);
2231 m_ys.reserve(m_reserveXY);
2232 }
2233
2237 int GetReserve() const
2238 {
2239 return m_reserveXY;
2240 }
2241
2242 protected:
2243 std::vector<double> m_xs;
2244 std::vector<double> m_ys;
2245 bool m_isMonotonicX;
2246 int m_reserveXY;
2247 size_t m_index;
2248 size_t m_endIndex;
2249 mpRange<double> m_rangeX;
2250 double m_lastX;
2251 mpRange<double> m_rangeY;
2252 double m_lastY;
2253
2258 virtual void Rewind() override;
2259
2266 virtual bool GetNextXY(double *x, double *y) override;
2267
2272 void DrawAddedPoint(double x, double y);
2273
2276 virtual double GetMinX()override
2277 {
2278 if (m_ViewAsBar)
2279 {
2280 // Make extra space for outer bars
2281 return m_rangeX.min - (m_deltaX / 2);
2282 }
2283 else
2284 {
2285 return m_rangeX.min;
2286 }
2287 }
2288
2291 virtual double GetMinY() override
2292 {
2293 return m_rangeY.min;
2294 }
2295
2298 virtual double GetMaxX() override
2299 {
2300 if(m_ViewAsBar)
2301 {
2302 // Make extra space for outer bars
2303 return m_rangeX.max + (m_deltaX / 2);
2304 }
2305 else
2306 {
2307 return m_rangeX.max;
2308 }
2309 }
2310
2313 virtual double GetMaxY() override
2314 {
2315 return m_rangeY.max;
2316 }
2317
2318 private:
2321 void First_Point(double x, double y);
2322
2325 void Check_Limit(double val, mpRange<double> *range, double *last, double *delta);
2326
2327 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpFXYVector);
2328};
2329
2338class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpProfile: public mpFunction
2339{
2340 public:
2344 mpProfile(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, int flags = mpALIGN_TOP);
2345
2351 virtual double GetY(double x) = 0;
2352
2353 protected:
2354
2359 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
2360
2361 private:
2362 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpProfile);
2363};
2364
2369class mpFXGeneric: public mpFX
2370{
2371 public:
2376 mpFXGeneric(const wxString &name = wxT("Generic FX function"), int flags = mpALIGN_LEFT, unsigned int yAxisID = 0) :
2377 mpFX(name, flags, yAxisID)
2378 {
2379 wxPen FXpen(*wxBLUE, 1, wxPENSTYLE_SOLID);
2380 SetDrawOutsideMargins(false);
2381 SetContinuity(true);
2382 SetPen(FXpen);
2383 SetStep(8); // Draw one point over eight
2384 }
2385
2390 virtual double GetY(double x)
2391 {
2392 double y;
2393 try
2394 {
2395 y = ComputeY(x);
2396 }
2397 catch (...)
2398 {
2399 y = 0;
2400 }
2401 m_rangeY.Update(y);
2402 return y;
2403 }
2404
2409 virtual double GetMinY()
2410 {
2411 return m_rangeY.min;
2412 }
2413
2418 virtual double GetMaxY()
2419 {
2420 return m_rangeY.max;
2421 }
2422
2423 protected:
2424 mpRange<double> m_rangeY;
2425
2431 virtual double ComputeY(double x) = 0;
2432
2433 private:
2434 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpFXGeneric);
2435};
2436
2441class mpGaussian: public mpFXGeneric
2442{
2443 public:
2449 mpGaussian(double mu, double sigma) :
2450 mpFXGeneric(wxT("Gaussian"), mpALIGN_LEFT)
2451 {
2452 m_mu = mu;
2453 m_sigma = sigma;
2454 m_variance = sigma * sigma;
2455 m_const = 1.0 / sqrt(2.0 * M_PI * m_variance);
2456 }
2457
2458 protected:
2459 double m_mu;
2460 double m_sigma;
2461 double m_variance;
2462 double m_const;
2463
2464 virtual double ComputeY(double x)
2465 {
2466 return m_const * exp(-(x - m_mu) * (x - m_mu) / (2.0 * m_variance));
2467 }
2468
2469 private:
2470 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpGaussian);
2471};
2472
2477class mpNormal: public mpFXGeneric
2478{
2479 public:
2485 mpNormal(double mu, double sigma) :
2486 mpFXGeneric(wxT("Gaussian"), mpALIGN_LEFT)
2487 {
2488 m_mu = mu;
2489 m_sigma = sigma;
2490 m_variance = sigma * sigma;
2491 m_const = 1.0 / (m_variance * sqrt(2.0 * M_PI));
2492 }
2493
2494 protected:
2495 double m_mu;
2496 double m_sigma;
2497 double m_variance;
2498 double m_const;
2499
2500 virtual double ComputeY(double x)
2501 {
2502 if (x < 0)
2503 return 0.0;
2504 else
2505 {
2506 double tmp = log(x) - m_mu;
2507 return m_const * exp(-tmp * tmp / (2.0 * m_variance)) / x;
2508 }
2509 }
2510
2511 private:
2512 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpNormal);
2513};
2514
2515//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2516// mpChart
2517//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2520class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpChart: public mpFunction
2521{
2522 public:
2524 mpChart(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString);
2525
2527 ~mpChart()
2528 {
2529 Clear();
2530 }
2531
2534 void SetChartValues(const std::vector<double> &data);
2535
2538 void SetChartLabels(const std::vector<std::string> &labelArray);
2539
2544 void AddData(const double &data, const std::string &label);
2545
2549 virtual void Clear();
2550
2551 virtual bool HasBBox()
2552 {
2553 return (values.size() > 0);
2554 }
2555
2556 protected:
2557 std::vector<double> values;
2558 std::vector<std::string> labels;
2559
2560 double m_max_value;
2561 double m_total_value;
2562
2563 private:
2564 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpChart);
2565};
2566
2567//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2568// mpBarChart - provided by Jose Davide Rondini
2569//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2570/* Defines for bar charts label positioning. */
2571#define mpBAR_NONE 0
2572#define mpBAR_AXIS_H 1
2573#define mpBAR_AXIS_V 2
2574#define mpBAR_INSIDE 3
2575#define mpBAR_TOP 4
2576
2579class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpBarChart: public mpChart
2580{
2581 public:
2583 mpBarChart(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, double width = 0.5);
2584
2586 ~mpBarChart()
2587 {
2588 Clear();
2589 }
2590
2592 void SetBarColour(const wxColour &colour);
2593
2595 void SetColumnWidth(const double colWidth)
2596 {
2597 m_width = colWidth;
2598 }
2599
2601 void SetBarLabelPosition(int position);
2602
2606 virtual double GetMinX();
2607
2611 virtual double GetMaxX();
2612
2616 virtual double GetMinY();
2617
2621 virtual double GetMaxY();
2622
2623 protected:
2624
2625 double m_width;
2626 wxColour m_barColour;
2627 int m_labelPos;
2628 double m_labelAngle;
2629
2634 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
2635
2636 private:
2637 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpBarChart);
2638};
2639
2643class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpPieChart: public mpChart
2644{
2645 public:
2649 mpPieChart(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, double radius = 20);
2650
2652 ~mpPieChart()
2653 {
2654 Clear();
2655 colours.clear();
2656 }
2657
2661 void SetCenter(const wxPoint center)
2662 {
2663 m_center = center;
2664 }
2665
2669 wxPoint GetCenter(void) const
2670 {
2671 return m_center;
2672 }
2673
2677 void SetPieColours(const std::vector<wxColour> &colourArray);
2678
2682 virtual double GetMinX()
2683 {
2684 return m_center.x - m_radius;
2685 }
2686
2690 virtual double GetMaxX()
2691 {
2692 return m_center.x + m_radius;
2693 }
2694
2698 virtual double GetMinY()
2699 {
2700 return m_center.y - m_radius;
2701 }
2702
2706 virtual double GetMaxY()
2707 {
2708 return m_center.y + m_radius;
2709 }
2710
2711 protected:
2712
2713 double m_radius;
2714 wxPoint m_center;
2715 std::vector<wxColour> colours;
2716
2721 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
2722
2724 const wxColour& GetColour(unsigned int id);
2725
2726 private:
2727 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpBarChart);
2728};
2729
2732//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

2734//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2742class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpScale: public mpLayer
2743{
2744 public:
2752 mpScale(const wxString &name, int flags, bool grids, mpLabelType labelType = mpLabel_AUTO, mpOptional_uint axisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT);
2753
2757 virtual bool HasBBox()
2758 {
2759 return false;
2760 }
2761
2765 int GetAxisID(void)
2766 {
2767 return m_axisID;
2768 }
2769
2774 void SetAxisID(unsigned int yAxisID)
2775 {
2776 m_axisID = yAxisID;
2777 }
2778
2781 void ShowTicks(bool ticks)
2782 {
2783 m_ticks = ticks;
2784 }
2785
2788 bool GetShowTicks() const
2789 {
2790 return m_ticks;
2791 }
2792
2795 void ShowGrids(bool grids)
2796 {
2797 m_grids = grids;
2798 }
2799
2802 bool GetShowGrids() const
2803 {
2804 return m_grids;
2805 }
2806
2811 void SetLabelFormat(const wxString &format, bool updateLabelMode = false)
2812 {
2813 m_labelFormat = format;
2814 if (updateLabelMode)
2815 m_labelType = mpLabel_USER;
2816 }
2817
2820 mpLabelType GetLabelMode() const
2821 {
2822 return m_labelType;
2823 }
2824
2828 void SetLabelMode(mpLabelType mode, unsigned int time_conv = MP_X_RAWTIME)
2829 {
2830 m_labelType = mode;
2831 m_timeConv = time_conv;
2832 }
2833
2836 const wxString& GetLabelFormat() const
2837 {
2838 return m_labelFormat;
2839 }
2840
2844 void SetGridPen(const wxPen &pen)
2845 {
2846 m_gridpen = pen;
2847 }
2848
2852 const wxPen& GetGridPen() const
2853 {
2854 return m_gridpen;
2855 }
2856
2860 void SetAuto(bool automaticScalingIsEnabled)
2861 {
2862 m_auto = automaticScalingIsEnabled;
2863 }
2864
2868 bool GetAuto() const
2869 {
2870 return m_auto;
2871 }
2872
2876 void SetMinScale(double min)
2877 {
2878 m_axisRange.SetMin(min);
2879 }
2880
2884 double GetMinScale() const
2885 {
2886 return m_axisRange.min;
2887 }
2888
2892 void SetMaxScale(double max)
2893 {
2894 m_axisRange.SetMax(max);
2895 }
2896
2900 double GetMaxScale() const
2901 {
2902 return m_axisRange.max;
2903 }
2904
2909 void SetScale(double min, double max)
2910 {
2911 m_axisRange.Set(min, max);
2912 }
2913
2918 void GetScale(double *min, double *max) const
2919 {
2920 *min = m_axisRange.min;
2921 *max = m_axisRange.max;
2922 }
2923
2927 void SetScale(mpRange<double> range)
2928 {
2929 m_axisRange = range;
2930 }
2931
2935 mpRange<double> GetScale() const
2936 {
2937 return mpRange<double>(m_axisRange);
2938 }
2939
2943 void SetHovering(bool hover)
2944 {
2945 m_hover = hover;
2946 }
2947
2951 virtual bool IsLogAxis()
2952 {
2953 return m_isLog;
2954 }
2955
2959 virtual void SetLogAxis(bool log)
2960 {
2961 m_isLog = log;
2962 }
2963
2967 void SetCoordIsAlwaysVisible(bool alwaysVisible)
2968 {
2969 m_CoordIsAlwaysVisible = alwaysVisible;
2970 }
2971
2975 bool GetCoordIsAlwaysVisible() const
2976 {
2977 return m_CoordIsAlwaysVisible;
2978 }
2979
2980 protected:
2981 static const wxCoord kTickSize = 4;
2982 static const wxCoord kAxisExtraSpace = 6;
2983
2984 int m_axisID;
2985 wxPen m_gridpen;
2986 bool m_ticks;
2987 bool m_grids;
2988 bool m_auto;
2989 mpRange<double> m_axisRange;
2990 mpLabelType m_labelType;
2991 unsigned int m_timeConv;
2992 wxString m_labelFormat;
2993 bool m_isLog;
2994 bool m_hover = false;
2995 bool m_CoordIsAlwaysVisible;
2996
2999 virtual int GetOrigin(mpWindow &w) = 0;
3000
3007 double GetStep(double scale, int minLabelSpacing);
3008
3016 virtual void DrawScaleName(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w, int origin, int labelSize) = 0;
3017
3023 wxString FormatLabelValue(double value);
3024
3029 wxString FormatLogValue(double n);
3030
3037 int GetLabelWidth(double value, wxDC &dc);
3038
3043 bool UseScientific(double maxAxisValue);
3044
3050 int GetSignificantDigits(double step, double maxAxisValue);
3051
3056 int GetDecimalDigits(double step);
3057
3061 struct {
3062 double step;
3063 double maxAxisValue;
3064 bool UseScientific;
3065 int SignificantDigits;
3066 int DecimalDigits;
3067 double EpsilonScale;
3068 } m_ScaleConstraints;
3069
3073 void ComputeScaleConstraints(double step, double maxAxisValue);
3074
3075 private:
3076 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpScale);
3077};
3078
3079
3085class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpScaleX: public mpScale
3086{
3087 public:
3093 mpScaleX(const wxString &name = _T("X"), int flags = mpALIGN_CENTERX, bool grids = false, mpLabelType type = mpLabel_AUTO) :
3094 mpScale(name, flags, grids, type)
3095 {
3096 m_subtype = mpsScaleX;
3097 }
3098
3100 bool IsTopAxis()
3101 {
3102 return ((GetAlign() == mpALIGN_BORDER_TOP) || (GetAlign() == mpALIGN_TOP));
3103 }
3104
3106 bool IsBottomAxis()
3107 {
3108 return ((GetAlign() == mpALIGN_BORDER_BOTTOM) || (GetAlign() == mpALIGN_BOTTOM));
3109 }
3110
3111 protected:
3116 static int m_orgy;
3117
3120 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
3121
3122 virtual int GetOrigin(mpWindow &w);
3123 virtual void DrawScaleName(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w, int origin, int labelSize);
3124
3125 private:
3126 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpScaleX);
3127
3131 friend mpScaleY;
3132};
3133
3140class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpScaleY: public mpScale
3141{
3142 public:
3150 mpScaleY(const wxString &name = _T("Y"), int flags = mpALIGN_CENTERY, bool grids = false, mpOptional_uint yAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT, mpLabelType labelType = mpLabel_AUTO) :
3151 mpScale(name, flags, grids, labelType, yAxisID)
3152 {
3153 m_subtype = mpsScaleY;
3154 m_axisWidth = MP_Y_BORDER_SEPARATION;
3155 m_xPos = 0;
3156 }
3157
3160 void UpdateAxisWidth(mpWindow &w);
3161
3163 int GetAxisWidth()
3164 {
3165 return m_axisWidth;
3166 }
3167
3169 bool IsLeftAxis()
3170 {
3171 return ((GetAlign() == mpALIGN_BORDER_LEFT) || (GetAlign() == mpALIGN_LEFT));
3172 }
3173
3175 bool IsRightAxis()
3176 {
3177 return ((GetAlign() == mpALIGN_BORDER_RIGHT) || (GetAlign() == mpALIGN_RIGHT));
3178 }
3179
3181 bool IsInside(wxCoord xPixel)
3182 {
3183 if ( (IsLeftAxis() || IsRightAxis()) && (xPixel >= m_xPos) && (xPixel <= (m_xPos + m_axisWidth)) )
3184 {
3185 return true;
3186 }
3187 return false;
3188 }
3189
3190 protected:
3191 int m_axisWidth;
3192 int m_xPos;
3193
3196 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
3197
3198 virtual int GetOrigin(mpWindow &w);
3199 virtual void DrawScaleName(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w, int origin, int labelSize);
3200
3201 private:
3202 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpScaleY);
3203};
3204
3205//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3206// mpWindow
3207//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3208
3214#define mpMOUSEMODE_DRAG 0
3216#define mpMOUSEMODE_ZOOMBOX 1
3217
3220//WX_DECLARE_HASH_MAP( int, mpLayer*, wxIntegerHash, wxIntegerEqual, mpLayerList );
3221typedef std::deque<mpLayer*> mpLayerList;
3222
3232struct mpAxisData
3233{
3234 mpScale* axis = nullptr;
3235 double scale = 1.0;
3236 double pos = 0;
3237 mpRange<double> bound;
3238 mpRange<double> desired;
3239 mpRange<double> lastDesired;
3240
3241 // Note: we don't use the default operator since we don't want to compare axis pointers
3243 bool operator==(const mpAxisData& other) const
3244 {
3245 return /*(axis == other.axis) && */ (scale == other.scale) && (pos == other.pos) &&
3246 (bound == other.bound) && (desired == other.desired);
3247 }
3248};
3249
3251typedef std::map<int, mpAxisData> mpAxisList;
3252
3259typedef enum {
3260 uXAxis = 1,
3261 uYAxis = 2,
3262 uXYAxis = 3
3263} mpAxisUpdate;
3264
3274typedef std::function<void(void *Sender, const wxString &classname, bool &cancel)> mpOnDeleteLayer;
3275
3282typedef std::function<void(void *Sender, wxMouseEvent &event, bool &cancel)> mpOnUserMouseAction;
3283
3288class mpMagnet
3289{
3290 public:
3291 mpMagnet()
3292 {
3293 m_enable = false;
3294 m_show = false;
3295 }
3296 ~mpMagnet()
3297 {
3298 ;
3299 }
3300
3302 void UpdateBox(const wxRect &plotArea)
3303 {
3304 m_domain = plotArea;
3305 }
3306
3308 void Enable(bool enable)
3309 {
3310 m_enable = enable;
3311 }
3312
3314 bool IsEnabled() const
3315 {
3316 return m_enable;
3317 }
3318
3320 void DrawCross(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
3321
3323 bool ShouldBeShown(wxPoint mousePos)
3324 {
3325 return m_enable && m_domain.Contains(mousePos);
3326 }
3327
3329 void Show(bool show)
3330 {
3331 m_show = show;
3332 }
3333
3335 bool IsShown()
3336 {
3337 return m_show;
3338 }
3339
3340 private:
3341 bool m_enable;
3342 bool m_show;
3343 wxRect m_domain;
3344};
3345
3367class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpWindow: public wxWindow
3368{
3369 public:
3370 mpWindow()
3371 {
3372 InitParameters();
3373 }
3374
3382 mpWindow(wxWindow *parent, wxWindowID id = wxID_ANY, const wxPoint &pos = wxDefaultPosition, const wxSize &size = wxDefaultSize,
3383 long flags = 0);
3384
3385 ~mpWindow();
3386
3390 wxMenu* GetPopupMenu()
3391 {
3392 return &m_popmenu;
3393 }
3394
3403 bool AddLayer(mpLayer *layer, bool refreshDisplay = true, bool refreshConfig = true);
3404
3417 bool DelLayer(mpLayer *layer, mpDeleteAction alsoDeleteObject, bool refreshDisplay = true, bool refreshConfig = true);
3418
3424 void DelAllLayers(mpDeleteAction alsoDeleteObject, bool refreshDisplay = true);
3425
3432 void DelAllPlot(mpDeleteAction alsoDeleteObject, mpFunctionType func = mpfAllType, bool refreshDisplay = true);
3433
3440 void DelAllYAxisAfterID(mpDeleteAction alsoDeleteObject, int yAxisID = 0, bool refreshDisplay = true);
3441
3447 mpLayer* GetLayer(int position);
3448
3453 int GetLayerPosition(mpLayer* layer);
3454
3461 mpLayer* GetLayersType(int position, mpLayerType type);
3462
3469 mpLayer* GetLayerPlot(int position, mpFunctionType func = mpfAllType);
3470
3476 mpScale* GetLayerAxis(int position, mpScaleType scale = mpsAllType);
3477
3486 mpFXYVector* GetXYSeries(unsigned int n, const wxString &name = _T("Serie "), bool create = true);
3487
3496 mpLayer* GetClosestPlot(wxCoord ix, wxCoord iy, double *xnear, double *ynear);
3497
3502 mpLayer* GetLayerByName(const wxString &name);
3503
3508 mpLayer* GetLayerByClassName(const wxString &name);
3509
3513 void RefreshLegend(void);
3514
3519 bool IsYAxisUsed(int yAxisID);
3520
3526 bool IsYAxisUsedByFunction(int yAxisID, int *position);
3527
3531 mpScaleX* GetLayerXAxis();
3532
3536 mpScaleY* GetLayerYAxis(int yAxisID);
3537
3541 void SetScaleX(const double scaleX)
3542 {
3543 if (MP_ISNOTNULL(scaleX))
3544 {
3545 m_AxisDataX.scale = scaleX;
3546 UpdateDesiredBoundingBox(uXAxis);
3547 }
3548 UpdateAll();
3549 }
3550
3555 double GetScaleX(void) const
3556 {
3557 return m_AxisDataX.scale;
3558 }
3559
3564 void SetScaleY(const double scaleY, int yAxisID)
3565 {
3566 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3567 if (MP_ISNOTNULL(scaleY))
3568 {
3569 m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].scale = scaleY;
3570 UpdateDesiredBoundingBox(uYAxis);
3571 }
3572 UpdateAll();
3573 }
3574
3580 double GetScaleY(int yAxisID)
3581 {
3582 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3583 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].scale;
3584 } // Schaling's method: maybe another method exists with the same name
3585
3586 [[deprecated("Incomplete, use UpdateBBox instead")]]
3589 void SetBound();
3590
3592 mpRange<double> GetBoundX(void) const
3593 {
3594 return m_AxisDataX.bound;
3595 }
3596
3598 mpRange<double> GetDesiredBoundX(void) const
3599 {
3600 return m_AxisDataX.desired;
3601 }
3602
3606 mpRange<double> GetBoundY(int yAxisID)
3607 {
3608 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3609 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].bound;
3610 }
3611
3615 mpRange<double> GetDesiredBoundY(int yAxisID)
3616 {
3617 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3618 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].desired;
3619 }
3620
3625 std::unordered_map<int, mpRange<double>> GetAllBoundY()
3626 {
3627 std::unordered_map<int, mpRange<double>> yRange;
3628 for (const MP_LOOP_ITER : m_AxisDataYList)
3629 {
3630 yRange[m_yID] = m_yData.bound;
3631 }
3632 return yRange;
3633 }
3634
3639 std::unordered_map<int, mpRange<double>> GetAllDesiredY()
3640 {
3641 std::unordered_map<int, mpRange<double>> yRange;
3642 for (const MP_LOOP_ITER : m_AxisDataYList)
3643 {
3644 yRange[m_yID] = m_yData.desired;
3645 }
3646 return yRange;
3647 }
3648
3652 void SetPosX(const double posX)
3653 {
3654 m_AxisDataX.pos = posX;
3655 UpdateDesiredBoundingBox(uXAxis);
3656 UpdateAll();
3657 }
3658
3663 double GetPosX(void) const
3664 {
3665 return m_AxisDataX.pos;
3666 }
3667
3672 void SetPosY(std::unordered_map<int, double>& posYList)
3673 {
3674 for (MP_LOOP_ITER : m_AxisDataYList)
3675 {
3676 m_yData.pos = posYList[m_yID];
3677 }
3678 UpdateDesiredBoundingBox(uYAxis);
3679 UpdateAll();
3680 }
3681
3687 double GetPosY(int yAxisID)
3688 {
3689 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3690 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].pos;
3691 }
3692
3696 int GetNOfYAxis(void) const
3697 {
3698 return (int)m_AxisDataYList.size();
3699 }
3700
3704 mpAxisList GetAxisDataYList(void) const
3705 {
3706 return m_AxisDataYList;
3707 }
3708
3714 void SetScreen(const int scrX, const int scrY)
3715 {
3716 m_scrX = scrX;
3717 m_scrY = scrY;
3718 m_plotWidth = m_scrX - (m_margin.left + m_margin.right);
3719 m_plotHeight = m_scrY - (m_margin.top + m_margin.bottom);
3720
3721 m_plotBoundaries.endPx = m_scrX;
3722 m_plotBoundariesMargin.endPx = m_scrX - m_margin.right;
3723 m_plotBoundaries.endPy = m_scrY;
3724 m_plotBoundariesMargin.endPy = m_scrY - m_margin.bottom;
3725
3726 m_PlotArea = wxRect(m_margin.left - m_extraMargin, m_margin.top - m_extraMargin,
3727 m_plotWidth + 2*m_extraMargin, m_plotHeight + 2*m_extraMargin);
3728
3729 m_magnet.UpdateBox(m_PlotArea);
3730 }
3731
3738 int GetScreenX(void) const
3739 {
3740 return m_scrX;
3741 }
3742
3749 int GetScreenY(void) const
3750 {
3751 return m_scrY;
3752 }
3753
3759 void SetPos(const double posX, std::unordered_map<int, double>& posYList)
3760 {
3761 m_AxisDataX.pos = posX;
3762 SetPosY(posYList);
3763 }
3764
3768 inline double p2x(const wxCoord pixelCoordX) const
3769 {
3770 return m_AxisDataX.pos + (pixelCoordX / m_AxisDataX.scale);
3771 }
3772
3776 inline double p2y(const wxCoord pixelCoordY, int yAxisID = 0)
3777 {
3778 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3779 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
3780 return 0.0;
3781 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].pos - (pixelCoordY / m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].scale);
3782 }
3783
3787 inline wxCoord x2p(const double x) const
3788 {
3789 return (wxCoord)((x - m_AxisDataX.pos) * m_AxisDataX.scale);
3790 }
3791
3795 inline wxCoord y2p(const double y, int yAxisID = 0)
3796 {
3797 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3798 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
3799 return 0;
3800 return (wxCoord)((m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].pos - y) * m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].scale);
3801 }
3802
3804 [[deprecated("Deprecated - use EnableBufferedPaintDC??")]]
3805 void EnableDoubleBuffer(const bool enabled)
3806 {
3807 EnableBufferedPaintDC(enabled);
3808 };
3809
3812 void EnableBufferedPaintDC(const bool enabled)
3813 {
3814 m_enableBufferedPaintDC = enabled;
3815 }
3816
3819 void EnableMousePanZoom(const bool enabled)
3820 {
3821 m_enableMouseNavigation = enabled;
3822 }
3823
3829 void LockAspect(bool enable = true);
3830
3835 inline bool IsAspectLocked() const
3836 {
3837 return m_lockaspect;
3838 }
3839
3844 void Fit();
3845
3852 void Fit(const mpRange<double> &rangeX, std::unordered_map<int, mpRange<double>> rangeY, wxCoord *printSizeX = NULL, wxCoord *printSizeY = NULL);
3853
3857 void FitX(void);
3858
3863 void FitY(int yAxisID);
3864
3869 void ZoomIn(const wxPoint &centerPoint = wxDefaultPosition);
3870
3875 void ZoomOut(const wxPoint &centerPoint = wxDefaultPosition);
3876
3878 void ZoomInX();
3879
3881 void ZoomOutX();
3882
3885 void ZoomInY(mpOptional_int yAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT);
3886
3889 void ZoomOutY(mpOptional_int yAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT);
3890
3895 void ZoomRect(wxPoint p0, wxPoint p1);
3896
3898 void UpdateAll();
3899
3900 // Added methods by Davide Rondini
3901
3905 unsigned int CountLayers();
3906
3909 unsigned int CountAllLayers()
3910 {
3911 return (unsigned int)m_layers.size();
3912 }
3913
3917 unsigned int CountLayersType(mpLayerType type);
3918
3922 unsigned int CountLayersFXYPlot();
3923
3930 void UpdateDesiredBoundingBox(mpAxisUpdate update)
3931 {
3932 // Change on X axis
3933 if (update & uXAxis)
3934 {
3935 m_AxisDataX.desired.Set(m_AxisDataX.pos + (m_margin.left / m_AxisDataX.scale),
3936 m_AxisDataX.pos + ((m_margin.left + m_plotWidth) / m_AxisDataX.scale));
3937 }
3938
3939 // Change on Y axis
3940 if (update & uYAxis)
3941 {
3942 for (MP_LOOP_ITER : m_AxisDataYList)
3943 {
3944 m_yData.desired.Set(m_yData.pos - ((m_margin.top + m_plotHeight) / m_yData.scale),
3945 m_yData.pos - (m_margin.top / m_yData.scale));
3946 }
3947 }
3948 }
3949
3955 mpFloatRectSimple GetBoundingBox(bool desired, unsigned int yAxisID = 0)
3956 {
3957 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3958 if (desired)
3959 return mpFloatRectSimple(m_AxisDataX.desired, m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].desired);
3960 else
3961 return mpFloatRectSimple(m_AxisDataX.bound, m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].bound);
3962 }
3963
3967 double GetDesiredXmin() const
3968 {
3969 return m_AxisDataX.desired.min;
3970 }
3971
3976 double GetDesiredXmax() const
3977 {
3978 return m_AxisDataX.desired.max;
3979 }
3980
3986 double GetDesiredYmin(int yAxisID)
3987 {
3988 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3989 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].desired.min;
3990 }
3991
3997 double GetDesiredYmax(int yAxisID)
3998 {
3999 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
4000 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].desired.max;
4001 }
4002
4008 bool GetBoundingBox(mpRange<double> *boundX, mpRange<double> *boundY, int yAxisID)
4009 {
4010 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
4011 return false;
4012 *boundX = m_AxisDataX.bound;
4013 *boundY = m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].bound;
4014 return true;
4015 }
4016
4022 bool PointIsInsideBound(double px, double py, int yAxisID)
4023 {
4024 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
4025 return false;
4026
4027 return m_AxisDataX.bound.PointIsInside(px) && GetBoundY(yAxisID).PointIsInside(py);
4028 }
4029
4035 void UpdateBoundingBoxToInclude(double px, double py, int yAxisID)
4036 {
4037 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
4038 return ;
4039
4040 m_AxisDataX.bound.Update(px);
4041 m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].bound.Update(py);
4042 }
4043
4044 /* Initialize bounding box with an initial point
4045 * @param px point on x-axis
4046 * @param py point on y-axis
4047 * @param yAxisID the y-axis ID
4048 */
4050 void InitializeBoundingBox(double px, double py, int yAxisID)
4051 {
4052 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
4053 return ;
4054
4055 m_AxisDataX.bound.Set(px, px);
4056 m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].bound.Set(py, py);
4057 }
4058
4061 void SetMPScrollbars(bool status);
4062
4065 bool GetMPScrollbars() const
4066 {
4067 return m_enableScrollBars;
4068 }

4076
4080 wxBitmap* BitmapScreenshot(wxSize imageSize = wxDefaultSize, bool fit = false);
4081
4085 void ClipboardScreenshot(wxSize imageSize = wxDefaultSize, bool fit = false);

4091 {
4092 m_wildcard = wildcard;
4093 }

4098 const wxString& GetWildcard(void) const
4099 {
4100 return m_wildcard;
4101 }
4102
4110 bool LoadFile(const wxString &filename = wxEmptyString);
4111
4116 void SetDefaultDir(const wxString &dirname)
4117 {
4118 m_DefaultDir = dirname;
4119 }
4120
4123 static double m_zoomIncrementalFactor;
4124
4128 static bool m_DefaultLegendIsAlwaysVisible;
4129
4135 void SetDefaultLegendIsAlwaysVisible(bool visible)
4136 {
4137 m_DefaultLegendIsAlwaysVisible = visible;
4138 }
4139
4143 static bool m_DefaultCoordIsAlwaysVisible;
4144
4145
4150 void SetAutoFit(bool autoFit)
4151 {
4152 m_autoFit = autoFit;
4153 }
4154
4161 void SetMargins(int top, int right, int bottom, int left);
4162
4164 void UpdateMargins()
4165 {
4166 SetMargins(m_marginOuter.top, m_marginOuter.right, m_marginOuter.bottom, m_marginOuter.left);
4167 }
4168
4170 void SetMarginTop(int top)
4171 {
4172 SetMargins(top, m_marginOuter.right, m_marginOuter.bottom, m_marginOuter.left);
4173 }
4174
4178 int GetMarginTop(bool minusExtra = false) const
4179 {
4180 if (minusExtra)
4181 return m_margin.top - m_extraMargin;
4182 else
4183 return m_margin.top;
4184 }
4185
4187 void SetMarginRight(int right)
4188 {
4189 SetMargins(m_marginOuter.top, right, m_marginOuter.bottom, m_marginOuter.left);
4190 }
4191
4195 int GetMarginRight(bool minusExtra = false) const
4196 {
4197 if (minusExtra)
4198 return m_margin.right - m_extraMargin;
4199 else
4200 return m_margin.right;
4201 }
4202
4204 int GetMarginRightOuter() const
4205 {
4206 return m_marginOuter.right;
4207 }
4208
4210 void SetMarginBottom(int bottom)
4211 {
4212 SetMargins(m_marginOuter.top, m_marginOuter.right, bottom, m_marginOuter.left);
4213 }
4214
4218 int GetMarginBottom(bool minusExtra = false) const
4219 {
4220 if (minusExtra)
4221 return m_margin.bottom - m_extraMargin;
4222 else
4223 return m_margin.bottom;
4224 }
4225
4227 void SetMarginLeft(int left)
4228 {
4229 SetMargins(m_marginOuter.top, m_marginOuter.right, m_marginOuter.bottom, left);
4230 }
4231
4235 int GetMarginLeft(bool minusExtra = false) const
4236 {
4237 if (minusExtra)
4238 return m_margin.left - m_extraMargin;
4239 else
4240 return m_margin.left;
4241 }
4242
4244 void SetExtraMargin(int extra)
4245 {
4246 m_extraMargin = extra;
4247 SetMargins(m_marginOuter.top, m_marginOuter.right, m_marginOuter.bottom, m_marginOuter.left);
4248 }
4249
4251 int GetExtraMargin() const
4252 {
4253 return m_extraMargin;
4254 }
4255
4257 int GetMarginLeftOuter() const
4258 {
4259 return m_marginOuter.left;
4260 }
4261
4263 int GetPlotWidth() const
4264 {
4265 return m_plotWidth;
4266 }
4267
4269 int GetPlotHeight() const
4270 {
4271 return m_plotHeight;
4272 }
4273
4278 mpRect GetPlotBoundaries(bool with_margin) const
4279 {
4280 mpRect bond;
4281 if (with_margin)
4282 bond = m_plotBoundariesMargin;
4283 else
4284 bond = m_plotBoundaries;
4285 bond.startPx -= m_extraMargin;
4286 bond.endPx += m_extraMargin;
4287 bond.startPy -= m_extraMargin;
4288 bond.endPy += m_extraMargin;
4289 return bond;
4290 }
4291
4295 int GetLeftYAxesWidth(mpOptional_int yAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT);
4296
4300 int GetRightYAxesWidth(mpOptional_int yAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT);
4301
4303 void SetDrawBox(bool drawbox)
4304 {
4305 m_drawBox = drawbox;
4306 }
4307
4309 bool GetDrawBox() const
4310 {
4311 return m_drawBox;
4312 }

4317 mpOptional_int IsInsideYAxis(const wxPoint &point);
4318
4322 mpInfoLayer* IsInsideInfoLayer(const wxPoint &point);

4337 bool IsLayerVisible(const unsigned int position);
4338
4342 void SetLayerVisible(const unsigned int position, bool viewable);
4343
4348 void SetColourTheme(const wxColour &bgColour, const wxColour &drawColour, const wxColour &axesColour);

4355 }

4359 {
4360 return m_bgColour;
4361 }
4362
4364 void SetbgColour(const wxColour &colour)
4365 {

4374 void SetOnDeleteLayer(const mpOnDeleteLayer &event)

4382 m_OnDeleteLayer = NULL;

4389 void SetOnUserMouseAction(const mpOnUserMouseAction &userMouseEventHandler)
4390 {

4393

4399
4405 bool IsLogXaxis()
4406 {
4407 if (m_AxisDataX.axis)
4408 return ((mpScaleX *)m_AxisDataX.axis)->IsLogAxis();
4409 else
4410 return false;
4411 }
4412
4417 bool IsLogYaxis(int yAxisID)
4418 {
4419 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
4420 mpScaleY* yAxis = GetLayerYAxis(yAxisID);
4421 if (yAxis)
4422 return yAxis->IsLogAxis();
4423 else
4424 return false;
4425 }
4426
4431 void SetLogXaxis(bool log)
4432 {
4433 if (m_AxisDataX.axis)
4434 ((mpScaleX *)m_AxisDataX.axis)->SetLogAxis(log);
4435 }
4436
4442 void SetLogYaxis(int yAxisID, bool log)
4443 {
4444 mpScaleY* yAxis = GetLayerYAxis(yAxisID);
4445 if (yAxis)
4446 yAxis->SetLogAxis(log);
4447 }
4448
4453 bool GetMagnetize() const
4454 {
4455 return m_magnet.IsEnabled();
4456 }
4457
4459 void SetMagnetize(bool mag)
4460 {
4461 m_magnet.Enable(mag);
4462 }
4463
4468 void SetMouseLeftDownAction(mpMouseButtonAction action)

4471 }

4498 }

4704 virtual void DesiredBoundsHaveChanged() {};
4705
4706 private:
4708 void CheckAndReportDesiredBoundsChanges();
4709
4714 unsigned int GetNewAxisDataID(void)
4715 {
4716 int newID = 0;
4717 for (const MP_LOOP_ITER : m_AxisDataYList)
4718 {
4719 if(m_yData.axis)
4720 {
4721 // This ID is used by an axis. Make sure the new ID is larger
4722 newID = std::max(newID, m_yID + 1);
4723 }
4724 }
4725 return newID;
4726 }
4727
4728 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpWindow);
4729
4730 // To have direct access to m_Screenshot_dc
4731 friend mpPrintout;
4732};
4733
4734//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4735// mpText - provided by Val Greene
4736//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4737
4745class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpText: public mpLayer
4746{
4747 public:
4750 mpText(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString) : mpLayer(mpLAYER_TEXT)
4751 {
4752 m_subtype = mptText;
4753 SetName(name);
4754 m_offsetx = 5;
4755 m_offsety = 50;
4756 m_location = mpMarginUser;
4757 m_ZIndex = mpZIndex_TEXT;
4758 }
4759
4763 mpText(const wxString &name, int offsetx, int offsety);
4764
4768 mpText(const wxString &name, mpLocation marginLocation);
4769
4772 virtual bool HasBBox()
4773 {
4774 return false;
4775 }
4776
4779 void SetLocation(mpLocation location)
4780 {
4781 m_location = location;
4782 }
4783
4786 mpLocation GetLocation() const
4787 {
4788 return m_location;
4789 }
4790
4793 void SetOffset(int offX, int offY)
4794 {
4795 m_offsetx = offX;
4796 m_offsety = offY;
4797 }
4798
4800 void GetOffset(int *offX, int *offY) const
4801 {
4802 *offX = m_offsetx;
4803 *offY = m_offsety;
4804 }
4805
4806 protected:
4807 int m_offsetx;
4808 int m_offsety;
4809 mpLocation m_location;
4810
4813 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
4814
4815 private:
4816 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpText);
4817};
4818
4822class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpTitle: public mpText
4823{
4824 public:
4827 mpTitle();
4828
4831 mpTitle(const wxString &name) :
4832 mpText(name, mpMarginTopCenter)
4833 {
4834 m_subtype = mptTitle;
4835 SetPen(*wxWHITE_PEN);
4836 SetBrush(*wxWHITE_BRUSH);
4837 }
4838
4839 private:

4841};

4843//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4844// mpPrintout - provided by Davide Rondini
4845//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4846
4851class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpPrintout: public wxPrintout
4852{
4853 public:
4854 mpPrintout()
4855 {
4856 plotWindow = NULL;
4857 drawn = false;
4858 stretch_factor = 2;
4859 }
4860
4866 mpPrintout(mpWindow *drawWindow, const wxString &title = _T("wxMathPlot print output"), int factor = 2);
4867 virtual ~mpPrintout()
4868 {
4869 ;
4870 }
4871
4875 void SetDrawState(bool drawState)
4876 {
4877 drawn = drawState;
4878 }
4879
4881 bool OnPrintPage(int page);
4883 bool HasPage(int page);
4884
4887 void SetFactor(int factor)
4888 {
4889 stretch_factor = factor;
4890 }
4891
4892 private:
4893 bool drawn;
4894 mpWindow* plotWindow;
4895 int stretch_factor; // To reduce the size of plot
4896
4897 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpPrintout);
4898};
4899
4900//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4901// mpMovableObject - provided by Jose Luis Blanco
4902//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4910class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpMovableObject: public mpFunction
4911{
4912 public:
4915 mpMovableObject() :
4916 m_reference_x(0), m_reference_y(0), m_reference_phi(0), m_shape_xs(0), m_shape_ys(0)
4917 {
4918 assert(m_type == mpLAYER_PLOT); // m_type is already set to mpLAYER_PLOT in default-arg mpFunction ctor: m_type = mpLAYER_PLOT;
4919 m_subtype = mpfMovable;
4920 }
4921
4922 virtual ~mpMovableObject() {}
4923
4926 void GetCoordinateBase(double &x, double &y, double &phi) const
4927 {
4928 x = m_reference_x;
4929 y = m_reference_y;
4930 phi = m_reference_phi;
4931 }
4932
4935 void SetCoordinateBase(double x, double y, double phi = 0)
4936 {
4937 m_reference_x = x;
4938 m_reference_y = y;
4939 m_reference_phi = phi;
4940 m_flags = mpALIGN_SW;
4941 ShapeUpdated();
4942 }
4943
4944 virtual bool HasBBox()
4945 {
4946 return m_trans_shape_xs.size() != 0;
4947 }
4948
4951 virtual double GetMinX()
4952 {
4953 return m_bbox_x.min;
4954 }
4955
4958 virtual double GetMaxX()
4959 {
4960 return m_bbox_x.max;
4961 }
4962
4965 virtual double GetMinY()
4966 {
4967 return m_bbox_y.min;
4968 }
4969
4972 virtual double GetMaxY()
4973 {
4974 return m_bbox_y.max;
4975 }
4976
4977 protected:
4978
4981 double m_reference_x;
4982 double m_reference_y;
4983 double m_reference_phi;
4984
4985 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
4986
4989 void TranslatePoint(double x, double y, double &out_x, double &out_y) const;
4990
4991 // the object points, in local coordinates (to be transformed by the current transformation).
4992 std::vector<double> m_shape_xs;
4993 std::vector<double> m_shape_ys;
4994
4995 // The buffer for the translated & rotated points (to avoid recomputing them with each mpWindow refresh).
4996 std::vector<double> m_trans_shape_xs;
4997 std::vector<double> m_trans_shape_ys;
4998
5002 mpRange<double> m_bbox_x;
5003 mpRange<double> m_bbox_y;
5004
5008 void ShapeUpdated();
5009
5010 private:
5011 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpMovableObject);
5012};
5013
5014//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
5015// mpCovarianceEllipse - provided by Jose Luis Blanco
5016//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
5028class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpCovarianceEllipse: public mpMovableObject
5029{
5030 public:
5034 mpCovarianceEllipse(double cov_00 = 1, double cov_11 = 1, double cov_01 = 0, double quantiles = 2, int segments = 32,
5035 const wxString &layerName = _T("")) : mpMovableObject(),
5036 m_cov_00(cov_00), m_cov_11(cov_11), m_cov_01(cov_01), m_quantiles(quantiles), m_segments(segments)
5037 {
5038 m_continuous = true;
5039 m_name = layerName;
5040 RecalculateShape();
5041 }
5042
5043 virtual ~mpCovarianceEllipse()
5044 {
5045 ;
5046 }
5047
5050 double GetQuantiles() const
5051 {
5052 return m_quantiles;
5053 }
5054
5057 void SetQuantiles(double q)
5058 {
5059 m_quantiles = q;
5060 RecalculateShape();
5061 }
5062
5064 void SetSegments(int segments)
5065 {
5066 m_segments = segments;
5067 }
5068
5070 int GetSegments() const
5071 {
5072 return m_segments;
5073 }
5074
5077 void GetCovarianceMatrix(double &cov_00, double &cov_01, double &cov_11) const
5078 {
5079 cov_00 = m_cov_00;
5080 cov_01 = m_cov_01;
5081 cov_11 = m_cov_11;
5082 }
5083
5086 void SetCovarianceMatrix(double cov_00, double cov_01, double cov_11)
5087 {
5088 m_cov_00 = cov_00;
5089 m_cov_01 = cov_01;
5090 m_cov_11 = cov_11;
5091 RecalculateShape();
5092 }
5093
5094 protected:
5097 double m_cov_00;
5098 double m_cov_11;
5099 double m_cov_01;
5100 double m_quantiles;
5101
5104 int m_segments;
5105
5108 void RecalculateShape();
5109
5110 private:
5111 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpCovarianceEllipse);
5112};

5164 m_scaledBitmap_offset_x = m_scaledBitmap_offset_y = 0;
5165 }
5166

5168 {
5169 ;
5170 }
5171
5174 void GetBitmapCopy(wxImage &outBmp) const;
5175
5183 void SetBitmap(const wxImage &inBmp, double x, double y, double lx, double ly);
5184
5187 virtual double GetMinX()
5188 {
5189 return m_bitmapX.min;
5190 }
5191
5194 virtual double GetMaxX()
5195 {
5196 return m_bitmapX.max;
5197 }
5198
5201 virtual double GetMinY()
5202 {
5203 return m_bitmapY.min;
5204 }
5205
5208 virtual double GetMaxY()
5209 {
5210 return m_bitmapY.max;
5211 }
5212
5213 protected:
5214
5217 wxImage m_bitmap;
5218 wxBitmap m_scaledBitmap;
5219 wxCoord m_scaledBitmap_offset_x;
5220 wxCoord m_scaledBitmap_offset_y;
5221 bool m_validImg;
5222 bool m_bitmapChanged;
5223
5226 mpRange<double> m_bitmapX;
5227 mpRange<double> m_bitmapY;
5228
5229 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
5230
5231 private:
5232 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpBitmapLayer);
5233};
5234
5235// utility class
5236
5238typedef enum __mp_Colour
5239{
5240 mpBlue,
5241 mpRed,
5242 mpGreen,
5243 mpPurple,
5244 mpYellow,
5245 mpFuchsia,
5246 mpLime,
5247 mpAqua,
5248 mpOlive
5249} mpColour;
5250
5255class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT wxIndexColour: public wxColour
5256{
5257 public:
5262 wxIndexColour(unsigned int id)
5263 {
5264 switch (id)
5265 {
5266 case 0:
5267 this->Set(0, 0, 255);
5268 break; // Blue
5269 case 1:
5270 this->Set(255, 0, 0);
5271 break; // Red
5272 case 2:
5273 this->Set(0, 128, 0);
5274 break; // Green
5275 case 3:
5276 this->Set(128, 0, 128);
5277 break; // Purple
5278 case 4:
5279 this->Set(255, 255, 0);
5280 break; // Yellow
5281 case 5:
5282 this->Set(255, 0, 255);
5283 break; // Fuchsia
5284 case 6:
5285 this->Set(0, 255, 0);
5286 break; // Lime
5287 case 7:
5288 this->Set(0, 255, 255);
5289 break; // Aqua/Cyan
5290 case 8:
5291 this->Set(128, 128, 0);
5292 break; // Olive
5293 default:
5294 this->Set((ChannelType)((rand() * 255) / RAND_MAX), (ChannelType)((rand() * 255) / RAND_MAX),
5295 (ChannelType)((rand() * 255) / RAND_MAX));
5296 }
5297 }
5298};
5299

Dialog box for configuring the plot's layer objects In this dialog, you can configure:
